## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Minimal command that triggers the bug
llmdoc annotate .
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output (redact any API keys).

- Go version (`go version`):
